name: Roguemaze Ultimate
short_description: RogueMaze Ultimate is a challenge game combining maze exploration and Roguelike mechanics. Players must keep moving under various unique rules to find the exit. Easy to pick up, yet full of depth — every run offers a brand-new experience.
detailed_description:
RogueMaze Ultimate is a unique maze challenge game that blends maze exploration with Roguelike mechanics.

Here, you can’t simply stop whenever you want — you must keep moving under different rules to reach the exit.

Each mode completely changes the way you explore, keeping every run fresh and unpredictable.

🌀 10 Modes with Unique Challenges:

  • Classic: Pure maze exploration.

  • Color: You can only pass through areas of the same color.

  • Pause: Special tiles let you pause — timing is everything.

  • Trail: Your path leaves a dangerous trail, no turning back.

  • Gravity: Gravity alters your movement, making it unpredictable.

  • Light: Float like a balloon, slow but risky.

  • 1.25 Speed: 25% faster movement — test your reflexes.

  • Blind: Limited vision, rely on intuition.

  • Buffer: Input delay requires careful planning.

  • Reverse: Controls are reversed — adapt or fail.

🎮 Features

  • Easy to learn, hard to master: Each run lasts just a few minutes but invites endless retries.

  • Diverse rules, fresh gameplay: 10 unique modes that change the way you play.

  • Lightweight yet deep: Simple controls, tough challenges, perfect for both casual and dedicated players.
